title: Neuroscience PhD Program Mission and Vision
content:
Neuroscience PhD Program Mission and Vision

Mission:

Neuroscience doctoral program, in which the basic subjects of cognitive sciences will be discussed together in the context of neuroscience, by making use of different fields such as psychology, neuroscience, computer engineering, by displaying a scientifically holistic and effective approach, creating an interdisciplinary, creative, innovative and academically strong education program in this field. aims to educate students with academic discipline

Vision:

Üsküdar University Neuroscience Doctorate Program aims to contribute to the production of scientific knowledge for the definition of human behavior and specialized processes related to human beings by preparing a multidisciplinary doctoral program to train specialists who have knowledge of the basic concepts of cognitive sciences, which are the basis for explaining human behavior, and who have interdisciplinary working skills and field knowledge. aims to lead science in the field.
